prompt_text:
### Demographics: 51-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Major Depressive Disorder
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~22.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 67.1 kg; Height 159.7 cm; BMI 26.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 111/63 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.8%; 9 months ago 8.4%; 6 months ago 7.9%; 3 months ago 7.4%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 229mg/dL; 9 months ago 231mg/dL; 6 months ago 176mg/dL; 3 months ago 177mg/dL; current 131mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 66.8kg; 9 months ago 65.8kg; 6 months ago 67.2kg; 3 months ago 67.1kg; current 67.1kg), Height (12 months ago 159.7cm; 9 months ago 159.7cm; 6 months ago 159.7cm; 3 months ago 159.7cm; current 159.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 26.0kg/m²; current 26.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 111mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 61mmHg; 9 months ago 62mmHg; 6 months ago 63mmHg; 3 months ago 63mmHg; current 63mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 10U/L; 6 months ago 12U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 15U/L), AST (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 20U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 18mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 16mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; current 12mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 212mg/g; 9 months ago 158mg/g; 6 months ago 197mg/g; 3 months ago 202mg/g; current 189mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 80mg/dL; 9 months ago 85mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 85mg/dL; current 83mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 43mg/dL; 9 months ago 44mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 44mg/dL; current 45mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 155mg/dL; 9 months ago 139mg/dL; 6 months ago 153mg/dL; 3 months ago 137mg/dL; current 147mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 12.9g/dL; current 12.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.39 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
